query: 宁德时代被基金持有规模怎么变化

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, wind_level1, wind_level2, wind_level3, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), latest_holding AS (SELECT fund_code, stock_code, stock_name, holding_quantity, holding_value, nav_ratio, date FROM fund_holding ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT fh.fund_code AS "基金代码", fh.fund_name AS "基金名称", fh.stock_name AS "持仓股票名称", fh.holding_quantity AS "持仓股数", fh.holding_value AS "持仓市值", fh.nav_ratio AS "持仓占比", fh.date AS "持仓日期" FROM latest_holding fh WHERE fh.stock_name LIKE '%宁德时代%' LIMIT 200;

plan.rationale: 查询最新持仓中包含宁德时代的基金及其持仓信息，结合最新基金规模数据

notes: 未指定日期，使用 fund_size 最新日期
查询宁德时代基金持有规模的最新变化，按日期倒序排序，限制返回最多200条记录
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: SELECT s.date AS "日期", s.fund_code AS "基金代码", s.fund_name AS "基金名称", s.fund_size AS "持有规模" FROM fund_size s WHERE s.fund_name = '宁德时代' ORDER BY s.date DESC LIMIT 200
